platform_history.details: Bountycaster required Privy/Farcaster web3 auth (useless for autonomous execution). Replaced with Dework (Web3 DAO task manager, public GraphQL API for org/workspace metadata, DEWORK_AUTH_TOKEN for task data).

remote_cached_inventory.description: Cleared in Cycle 17 — all MergeOS staged branches had their PRs merged (virtual credit, $0 withdrawable). Forks pending deletion (blocked by GH_PAT delete_repo scope).
remote_cached_inventory.clear_reason: MergeOS is VIRTUAL_CREDIT_FLAGGED per agent.md §0. All 4 open PRs (#97/#99/#278/#289) were merged on 2026-07-19 for 100 MRG ($1.00 internal rate, $0 withdrawable). No future value.

platform_verification.description: Pre-Flight Reconnaissance Protocol results (agent.md §0). Platforms must pass all 5 checks before targeting.

checks.historical_withdrawal: PASS — IssueHunt pays via Stripe Connect to bank accounts
checks.external_escrow: PASS — IssueHunt holds USD escrow internally, backed by Stripe
checks.withdrawal_path: PASS — contributors withdraw via Stripe Connect dashboard
checks.reward_label_audit: PASS — advertised amounts match actual payouts

checks.mainnet_deployment: INCONCLUSIVE — Dework uses org-native tokens, verification pending

dework.notes: Claims crypto payouts (USDC/ETH/org tokens) but deep escrow verification not yet performed. Held pending operator review.

checks.mainnet_deployment: FAIL — Solana program status: not_deployed (deployments/addresses.json confirms null mainnet-beta)
checks.historical_withdrawal: FAIL — ledger sequences are private database entries, no on-chain tx hashes found in 30+ merged PR comments
checks.external_escrow: FAIL — escrow is internal Go backend database table, not smart contract or third-party custody
checks.withdrawal_path: FAIL — zero withdrawal/redeem/fiat code paths found in codebase search
checks.reward_label_audit: FAIL — issue titles advertise [1000 MRG] but actual payouts are 50 MRG; policy doc states 'marketing budget, not automatic payout amount'

evidence.payout_comments: Maintainer comments use code 'future-small' — 'future' indicates deferred/not-yet-real
evidence.internal_rate: 100 MRG = $1.00 display rate, but no conversion mechanism exists

mergeos.notes: MergeOS is a real software product with active development, but MRG tokens are internal credits with zero withdrawable value. 150 MRG earned across 6 merged PRs = $0.00 withdrawable. Branches cached on origin are preserved in case MRG deploys to mainnet in the future.

opire.evidence: Payment handled by Opire via Stripe. PRs #3498, #3499, #3500 submitted.

targeting_strategy.policy: ONLY target platforms with status REAL_ASSET_VERIFIED. Virtual-credit platforms are blocked. Unverified platforms are held.
targeting_strategy.kpi_redefinition: Primary KPI is now 'Real USD or Certified Crypto Earned and Withdrawn', not token counts or ledger sequences.

checks.mainnet_deployment: PASS — Dework pays in USDC/ETH/DAI (well-known mainnet-deployed tokens). Org-native tokens (BANK/MOONEY/BABEL/NEWO) need per-token verification.
checks.historical_withdrawal: PASS (conditional) — found 308 DONE+rewarded+assigned tasks in ZetaChain/BD Referrers alone. Payouts are P2P crypto transfers to contributor wallets.
checks.external_escrow: INCONCLUSIVE — Dework is a task manager, NOT an escrow platform. Orgs promise to pay but funds are NOT locked. Payment is manual P2P transfer after task completion.
checks.withdrawal_path: PASS — crypto payouts go directly to contributor wallet. No platform-level withdrawal gate (unlike MergeOS which had none).
checks.reward_label_audit: PASS — reward amounts in API match displayed amounts. 5000000 USDC (6 decimals) = 5 USDC. No systematic inflation detected.

targeting_policy.notes: Dework is promise-based, not escrow-based. Target only USDC/ETH/DAI bounties ≥$200 from orgs with proven payout history. Skip org-native tokens.

dework.notes: Cycle 17 Pre-Flight complete. CONDITIONAL_VERIFIED — targetable with restrictions. Risk: no escrow, org may not pay. Mitigation: only target high-value bounties from orgs with payout history.

archive_info.purge_reason: Cycle 8: Hard cold-storage data isolation — removed all MergeOS virtual credits, MERGED entries, and workflow artifacts from active tracking.

archive.closure_reason: Parent issue #1216 was closed on 2026-07-19; no path to bounty payout

dework_candidates.task_summary: Create n8n workflow JSON + README for weekly GitHub repo activity summary using Claude API. Deliverable: importable .json + README + screenshot.

fit_assessment.reason: Code bounty — n8n workflow JSON + Claude API integration + README. All within bot capability matrix (JSON config + markdown + API integration).
fit_assessment.differentiation_needed: 6 competing PRs already. Need to differentiate with: (a) better README, (b) Discord + email both supported, (c) FR/EN language support per criteria, (d) actual tested screenshot.

dework_candidates.recommendation: Strong candidate. Build in Cycle 21 if operator approves. Differentiation strategy: comprehensive multi-language + multi-channel delivery + thorough README.

dework_candidates.task_summary: Create opinionated CLAUDE.md template for Next.js 15 + SQLite SaaS project. Markdown deliverable covering project structure, conventions, DB rules, anti-patterns.

fit_assessment.reason: Pure markdown template — bot's text-generation strength. Next.js + SQLite are well-known stacks in training data.
fit_assessment.differentiation_needed: 18 competing PRs (very high competition). Need truly opinionated content with concrete examples, not generic advice.

dework_candidates.recommendation: Moderate candidate. Lower value ($75) + higher competition (18 PRs). Build only if Cycle 21 has spare capacity after CBB #5.

dework_candidates.task_summary: Code autocomplete feature for Boostnote (Electron + CodeMirror editor).

fit_assessment.reason: Need to investigate Boostnote's codebase first — Electron + CodeMirror stack. May require deep editor integration which is hard to do without testing.

dework_candidates.recommendation: Low priority. $42 is below $50 threshold. Skip unless operator wants to expand capability matrix to Electron apps.

sweep_history.notes: Dework scraper timed out (90s) but logs show Layer 2 filter actively rejecting community rangers / moderators / non-code tasks. Opire sweep found 8 aggregator-mirror issues pointing to 2 real CBB bounties (#2 and #5). IssueHunt found 1 low-value code bounty ($42 Boostnote).

rejected_reasons.boostnote_2567: Repo archived 5 years ago (BoostIO/BoostNote-Legacy). Last commit Sep 2021. $42 escrow frozen — PR cannot merge.
rejected_reasons.apache_superset_3821: Issue CLOSED 4 years ago (2022-03-16). Stale escrow.
rejected_reasons.zardoy_space_squid_5: Maintainer explicitly hostile to 'easy-money bounty hunters' (issue body). 6 PRs already MERGED on this feature. Pattern-010 hostile-maintainer risk.

sweep_history.notes: IssueHunt's current pool is effectively dead for our profile. Threshold lowered but no actionable candidates exist right now. Pre-qualification (active repo + open issue + non-hostile maintainer + real-asset escrow) filters out everything.
